subcodes.first_line: This is the Kawthar of Life that hath flowed from the Pen of the All-Merciful. Blessed is he who drinketh thereof and is numbered among them that have attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کوثر الحیوان قد جری من قلم الرحمن طوبی لمن شرب منه و کان من الفائزین قل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @living waters; water of life, @attaining the life of the spirit, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
